featured.name: bud
featured.description: Build tool that wraps webpack complexity behind an elegant, minimal API
featured.highlight: 854+ PRs merged. The official build system for the Roots WordPress ecosystem — webpack, SWC, esbuild, PostCSS, and Tailwind out of the box. Now in maintenance mode.

featured.highlight: The most popular WordPress starter theme. Contributed build system integration and modern development workflow.
